domain_experience: adjacent exposure to HVAC service business economics and owner needs through family access
assets: ability to build custom software and automations
family relationship with a local HVAC service business owner/operator
network_access: warm introductions to local HVAC service business owners through brother
constraints: no owned audience or media channel
distribution is relationship-mediated rather than directly controlled
current access appears local and likely limited in scale
credibility_signals: 8 years of HVAC distribution operations experience
builder who can independently ship software and automations
close relationship with an active HVAC service operator
unfair_advantages: combination of HVAC operational context and direct technical build capability
warm path to owner discovery interviews without cold outbound as the only starting point

usable_edge: Real HVAC operational familiarity from years in distribution ops
Can directly build and iterate software or automations for niche workflows
Has warm access to at least some HVAC service owners for discovery and initial selling
Likely stronger empathy for HVAC workflow pain than a generic vertical SaaS founder
restricted_or_unusable_edge: No direct evidence of owned, repeatable distribution
Brother-brokered access should not be treated as fully owned customer acquisition
fake_or_overstated_edge: Introductions to owners are not the same as durable distribution
Industry background alone is not a moat without trust, access, or proof of demand
weak_spots: No proof of direct buyer trust with paying owners
Unknown scale and quality of reachable owner network
Unclear initial product wedge and buyer segment
Unknown willingness to pay for product versus service
follow_up_questions: How many owners can your brother introduce you to in the next 30 days?
What kind of HVAC businesses are they: small local, multi-location, or larger regional operators?
Do you also have direct relationships in HVAC distribution that are reusable for sales or pilots?
Which workflows do you understand best and could improve fastest with software or automations?
Do you want to start with software, done-for-you automation, or a hybrid offer?
confidence_notes: High confidence that HVAC domain familiarity and technical build capability are real usable edges because the user stated both directly.
Medium confidence that owner access is useful but limited, because the user described introductions through a brother rather than directly owned distribution.
Low confidence on the exact buyer quality, reachable network size, and best business model because those details were not provided.
